# Amazon RDS Connector - Full Documentation

# Amazon RDS Connector 1.4 Reference

> For the full documentation index, see: https://docs.mulesoft.com/llms.txt

> [!NOTE] Where possible, we changed noninclusive terms to align with our company value of Equality.
> We maintained certain terms to avoid any effect on customer implementations.

Anypoint Connector for Amazon RDS (Amazon RDS Connector) provides connectivity to the Amazon
Relational Database Service (Amazon RDS) API, enabling you to interface with Amazon RDS to provide
cost-efficient and resizable capacity while automating time-consuming administration tasks such as
hardware provisioning, database setup, patching and backups.

Release Notes:
[Amazon RDS Connector Release Notes](../../release-notes/connector/amazon-rds-connector-release-notes-mule-4)

## Configurations

---

### Default Configuration

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name for this configuration. Connectors reference the configuration with this name.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Connection</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#config_basic">Basic</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#config_role">Role</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The connection types to provide to this configuration.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Expiration Policy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ExpirationPolicy">Expiration Policy</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Configures the minimum amount of time that a dynamic configuration instance can remain idle before Mule considers it eligible for expiration. This does not mean that the platform expires the instance at the exact moment that it becomes eligible. Mule purges the instances as appropriate.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Connection Types

### Basic

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Session Token</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The session token provided by Amazon STS.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Connection Timeout</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The amount of time to wait (in milliseconds) when initially establishing a connection before the connector gives up and times out. A value of 0 means infinity and is not recommended.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>50</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Connection Timeout Unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time unit used in the connection timeout configurations.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>SECONDS</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Max Connections</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Sets the maximum number of allowed open HTTP connections.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Socket Timeout</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The amount of time to wait (in milliseconds) for data to be transferred over an established, open connection before the connection times out. A value of 0 means infinity and is not recommended.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>50</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Socket Timeout Unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time unit used in the socket timeout configurations.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>SECONDS</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Access Key</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The access key provided by Amazon.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Secret Key</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The secret key provided by Amazon.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Region Endpoint</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Set the topic region endpoint.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>US_EAST_1</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Try Default AWSCredentials Provider Chain</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Set this field to true to obtain credentials from the AWS environment, See <a href="https://docs.aws.amazon.com/sdk-for-java/latest/developer-guide/credentials.html">Using credentials providers in the AWS SDK for Java 2.x</a>.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>false</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Custom Service Endpoint</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Sets a custom service endpoint. Useful when a non-standard service endpoint is required, such as a VPC endpoint.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>TLS Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#Tls">TLS</a></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#Reconnection">Reconnection</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>When the application is deployed, a connectivity test is performed on all connectors. If set to true, deployment fails if the test doesnât pass after exhausting the associated reconnection strategy.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Host</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The optional proxy host.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Port</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The optional proxy port.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Username</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The optional proxy username.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Password</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The optional proxy password.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Domain</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The optional proxy domain.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Workstation</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The optional proxy workstation.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Role

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Role ARN</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The Role ARN unique identifies role to assume to gain cross account access.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>External ID</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A unique identifier used when assuming an IAM role in an external account. Provide the value specified by the administrator of the target account for added security.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Custom STS Endpoint</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Sets a custom STS endpoint. Useful when a non-standard service endpoint is required, such as a VPC endpoint.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Connection Timeout</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The amount of time to wait (in milliseconds) when initially establishing a connection before the connector gives up and times out. A value of 0 means infinity and is not recommended.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>50</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Connection Timeout Unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time unit used in the connection timeout configurations.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>SECONDS</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Max Connections</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Sets the maximum number of allowed open HTTP connections.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Socket Timeout</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The amount of time to wait (in milliseconds) for data to be transferred over an established, open connection before the connection times out. A value of 0 means infinity and is not recommended.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>50</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Socket Timeout Unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time unit used in the socket timeout configurations.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>SECONDS</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Access Key</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The access key provided by Amazon.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Secret Key</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The secret key provided by Amazon.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Region Endpoint</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Set the topic region endpoint.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>US_EAST_1</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Try Default AWSCredentials Provider Chain</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Set this field to true to obtain credentials from the AWS environment, See <a href="https://docs.aws.amazon.com/sdk-for-java/latest/developer-guide/credentials.html">Using credentials providers in the AWS SDK for Java 2.x</a>.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>false</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Custom Service Endpoint</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Sets a custom service endpoint. Useful when a non-standard service endpoint is required, such as a VPC endpoint.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>TLS Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#Tls">TLS</a></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#Reconnection">Reconnection</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>When the application is deployed, a connectivity test is performed on all connectors. If set to true, deployment fails if the test doesnât pass after exhausting the associated reconnection strategy.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Host</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The optional proxy host.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Port</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The optional proxy port.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Username</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The optional proxy username.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Password</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The optional proxy password.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Domain</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The optional proxy domain.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Workstation</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The optional proxy workstation.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

- [Delete DB Snapshot](#deleteDbSnapshot)
- [Describe DB Instances](#describeDbInstances)
- [Describe DB Snapshots](#describeDbSnapshots)
- [Describe Events](#describeEvents)
- [Describe Reserved DB Instances](#describeReservedDbInstances)
- [Describe Reserved DB Instances Offerings](#describeReservedDbInstancesOfferings)
- [Modify DB Instance](#modifyDbInstance)
- [Modify DB Snapshot](#modifyDbSnapshot)
- [Purchase Reserved DB Instances Offering](#purchaseReservedDbInstancesOffering)
- [Reboot DB Instance](#rebootDbInstance)
- [Restore DB Instance From DB Snapshot](#restoreDbInstanceFromDbSnapshot)
- [Restore DB Instance To Point In Time](#restoreDbInstanceToPointInTime)
- [Start DB Instance](#startDbInstance)
- [Stop DB Instance](#stopDbInstance)

### Copy Db Snapshot

`<rds:copy-db-snapshot>`

This operation copies a DBSnapshot. The source DBSnapshot must be in the "available" state.

For more information, see this operation in the Amazon
[API Reference](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonRDS/latest/APIReference/API_CopyDBSnapshot.html).

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Source DB Snapshot Identifier</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The identifier for the source DB snapshot.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target DB Snapshot Identifier</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The identifier for the copy of the snapshot.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#DBSnapshot">DB Snapshot</a></p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- RDS:ACCESS_DENIED_EXCEPTION
- RDS:AUTHORIZATION_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:CERTIFICATE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:CONNECTIVITY
- RDS:DB_CLUSTER_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:DB_INSTANCE_ALREADY_EXISTS
- RDS:DB_INSTANCE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_PARAMETER_GROUP_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SECURITY_GROUP_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SNAPSHOT_ALREADY_EXISTS
- RDS:DB_SNAPSHOT_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SUBNET_GROUP_DOES_NOT_COVER_ENOUGH_A_ZS
- RDS:DB_SUBNET_GROUP_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:DB_UPGRADE_DEPENDENCY_FAILURE
- RDS:DOMAIN_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:INCOMPLETE_SIGNATURE
- RDS:INSUFFICIENT_DB_INSTANCE_CAPACITY
- RDS:INSTANCE_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:INTERNAL_FAILURE
- RDS:INVALID_ACTION
- RDS:INVALID_CLIENT_TOKEN_ID
- RDS:INVALID_DB_CLUSTER_STATE_FAULT
- RDS:INVALID_DB_INSTANCE_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_DB_SECURITY_GROUP_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_DB_SNAPSHOT_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_PARAMETER_COMBINATION
- RDS:INVALID_PARAMETER_VALUE
- RDS:INVALID_QUERY_PARAMETER
- RDS:INVALID_RESTORE_FAULT
- RDS:INVALID_SUBNET
- RDS:INVALID_VPC_NETWORK_STATE_FAULT
- RDS:KMS_KEY_NOT_ACCESSIBLE_FAULT
- RDS:MALFORMED_QUERY_STRING
- RDS:MISSING_ACTION
- RDS:MISSING_AUTHENTICATION_TOKEN
- RDS:MISSING_PARAMETER
- RDS:OPT_IN_REQUIRED
- RDS:OPTION_GROUP_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:POINT_IN_TIME_RESTORE_NOT_ENABLED
- RDS:PROVISIONED_IOPS_NOT_AVAILABLE_IN_AZ_FAULT
- RDS:REQUEST_EXPIRED
- RDS:RESERVED_DB_INSTANCE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:RESERVED_DB_INSTANCES_OFFERING_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- RDS:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- RDS:SNAPSHOT_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:STORAGE_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:STORAGE_TYPE_NOT_SUPPORTED
- RDS:THROTTLING_EXCEPTION
- RDS:UNKNOWN
- RDS:VALIDATION_ERROR

## Create DB Instance

`<rds:create-db-instance>`

This operation creates a new database instance.

For more information, see this operation in the Amazon
[API Reference](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonRDS/latest/APIReference/API_CreateDBInstance.html).

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Auto Minor Version Upgrade</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>false</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Copy Tags to Snapshot</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>false</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Storage Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Allocated Storage</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Backup Retention Period</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Preferred Backup Window</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Preferred Maintenance Window</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Promotion Tier</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Storage Encrypted</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>false</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>DB Cluster Identifier</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>DB Subnet Group Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Domain IAM Role Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Enable IAM Database Authentication</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>false</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>License Model</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Publicly Accessible</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>false</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>TDE Credential ARN</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>TDE Credential Password</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>DB Security Groups</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Master User Password</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>VPC Security Group IDs</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Master User Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>KMS Key ID</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Monitoring Interval</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Monitoring Role ARN</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>DB Instance Class</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>DB Instance Identifier</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>DB Parameter Group Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Domain</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Engine Version</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>IOPS</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Multi AZ</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>false</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Option Group Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Availability Zone</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>DB Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>DB Port Number</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Engine</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Character Set Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Tags</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#Tag">Tag</a></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Time Zone</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#DBInstance">DB Instance</a></p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- RDS:ACCESS_DENIED_EXCEPTION
- RDS:AUTHORIZATION_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:CERTIFICATE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:CONNECTIVITY
- RDS:DB_CLUSTER_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:DB_INSTANCE_ALREADY_EXISTS
- RDS:DB_INSTANCE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_PARAMETER_GROUP_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SECURITY_GROUP_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SNAPSHOT_ALREADY_EXISTS
- RDS:DB_SNAPSHOT_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SUBNET_GROUP_DOES_NOT_COVER_ENOUGH_A_ZS
- RDS:DB_SUBNET_GROUP_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:DB_UPGRADE_DEPENDENCY_FAILURE
- RDS:DOMAIN_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:INCOMPLETE_SIGNATURE
- RDS:INSUFFICIENT_DB_INSTANCE_CAPACITY
- RDS:INSTANCE_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:INTERNAL_FAILURE
- RDS:INVALID_ACTION
- RDS:INVALID_CLIENT_TOKEN_ID
- RDS:INVALID_DB_CLUSTER_STATE_FAULT
- RDS:INVALID_DB_INSTANCE_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_DB_SECURITY_GROUP_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_DB_SNAPSHOT_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_PARAMETER_COMBINATION
- RDS:INVALID_PARAMETER_VALUE
- RDS:INVALID_QUERY_PARAMETER
- RDS:INVALID_RESTORE_FAULT
- RDS:INVALID_SUBNET
- RDS:INVALID_VPC_NETWORK_STATE_FAULT
- RDS:KMS_KEY_NOT_ACCESSIBLE_FAULT
- RDS:MALFORMED_QUERY_STRING
- RDS:MISSING_ACTION
- RDS:MISSING_AUTHENTICATION_TOKEN
- RDS:MISSING_PARAMETER
- RDS:OPT_IN_REQUIRED
- RDS:OPTION_GROUP_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:POINT_IN_TIME_RESTORE_NOT_ENABLED
- RDS:PROVISIONED_IOPS_NOT_AVAILABLE_IN_AZ_FAULT
- RDS:REQUEST_EXPIRED
- RDS:RESERVED_DB_INSTANCE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:RESERVED_DB_INSTANCES_OFFERING_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- RDS:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- RDS:SNAPSHOT_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:STORAGE_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:STORAGE_TYPE_NOT_SUPPORTED
- RDS:THROTTLING_EXCEPTION
- RDS:UNKNOWN
- RDS:VALIDATION_ERROR

## Create DB Instance Read Replica

`<rds:create-db-instance-read-replica>`

This operation creates a new DB instance that acts as a Read Replica for an existing source DB
instance. You can create a Read Replica for a DB instance running MySQL, MariaDB, or PostgreSQL.

Amazon Aurora does not support this action. You must call the `CreateDBInstance` action to create a
DB instance for an Aurora DB cluster.

For more information, see this operation in the Amazon
[API Reference](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonRDS/latest/APIReference/API_CreateDBInstanceReadReplica.html).

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Publicly Accessible</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Specifies the accessibility options for the DB instance.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>false</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>DB Subnet Group Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Specifies a DB subnet group for the DB instance.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>KMS Key ID</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The AWS KMS key ID for an encrypted Read Replica.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Pre-Signed URL</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The URL that contains a Signature Version 4 signed request for the create-db-instance-read-replica API action in the source AWS Region that contains the source DB instance.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Enable IAM Database Authentication</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Set this parameter to <code>true</code> to enable mapping of AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) accounts to database accounts.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>false</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>DB Instance Identifier</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The DB instance identifier of the Read Replica.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Source DB Instance Identifier</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The identifier of the DB instance that will act as the source for the Read Replica.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>DB Instance Class</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The compute and memory capacity of the Read Replica.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Availability Zone</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The Amazon EC2 Availability Zone that the Read Replica will be created in.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Port</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The port number that the DB instance uses for connections.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>IOPS</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The amount of Provisioned IOPS (input/output operations per second) to be initially allocated for the DB instance.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Option Group Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The option group the DB instance will be associated with.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Tags</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#Tag">Tag</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A list of tags.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Source Region</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The ID of the region that contains the source for the read replica.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Auto Minor Version Upgrade</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>false</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Copy Tags to Snapshot</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>false</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Storage Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Monitoring Interval</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Monitoring Role ARN</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#DBInstance">DB Instance</a></p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- RDS:ACCESS_DENIED_EXCEPTION
- RDS:AUTHORIZATION_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:CERTIFICATE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:CONNECTIVITY
- RDS:DB_CLUSTER_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:DB_INSTANCE_ALREADY_EXISTS
- RDS:DB_INSTANCE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_PARAMETER_GROUP_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SECURITY_GROUP_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SNAPSHOT_ALREADY_EXISTS
- RDS:DB_SNAPSHOT_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SUBNET_GROUP_DOES_NOT_COVER_ENOUGH_A_ZS
- RDS:DB_SUBNET_GROUP_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:DB_UPGRADE_DEPENDENCY_FAILURE
- RDS:DOMAIN_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:INCOMPLETE_SIGNATURE
- RDS:INSUFFICIENT_DB_INSTANCE_CAPACITY
- RDS:INSTANCE_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:INTERNAL_FAILURE
- RDS:INVALID_ACTION
- RDS:INVALID_CLIENT_TOKEN_ID
- RDS:INVALID_DB_CLUSTER_STATE_FAULT
- RDS:INVALID_DB_INSTANCE_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_DB_SECURITY_GROUP_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_DB_SNAPSHOT_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_PARAMETER_COMBINATION
- RDS:INVALID_PARAMETER_VALUE
- RDS:INVALID_QUERY_PARAMETER
- RDS:INVALID_RESTORE_FAULT
- RDS:INVALID_SUBNET
- RDS:INVALID_VPC_NETWORK_STATE_FAULT
- RDS:KMS_KEY_NOT_ACCESSIBLE_FAULT
- RDS:MALFORMED_QUERY_STRING
- RDS:MISSING_ACTION
- RDS:MISSING_AUTHENTICATION_TOKEN
- RDS:MISSING_PARAMETER
- RDS:OPT_IN_REQUIRED
- RDS:OPTION_GROUP_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:POINT_IN_TIME_RESTORE_NOT_ENABLED
- RDS:PROVISIONED_IOPS_NOT_AVAILABLE_IN_AZ_FAULT
- RDS:REQUEST_EXPIRED
- RDS:RESERVED_DB_INSTANCE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:RESERVED_DB_INSTANCES_OFFERING_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- RDS:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- RDS:SNAPSHOT_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:STORAGE_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:STORAGE_TYPE_NOT_SUPPORTED
- RDS:THROTTLING_EXCEPTION
- RDS:UNKNOWN
- RDS:VALIDATION_ERROR

## Create DB Snapshot

`<rds:create-db-snapshot>`

This operation creates a DBSnapshot. The source DBInstance must be in the "available" state.

For more information, see this operation in the Amazon
[API Reference](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonRDS/latest/APIReference/API_CreateDBSnapshot.html).

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>DB Instance Identifier</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The DB instance identifier. The unique key that identifies a DB instance.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>DB Snapshot Identifier</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The identifier for the DB snapshot.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Tags</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#Tag">Tag</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A list of tags.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#DBSnapshot">DB Snapshot</a></p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- RDS:ACCESS_DENIED_EXCEPTION
- RDS:AUTHORIZATION_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:CERTIFICATE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:CONNECTIVITY
- RDS:DB_CLUSTER_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:DB_INSTANCE_ALREADY_EXISTS
- RDS:DB_INSTANCE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_PARAMETER_GROUP_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SECURITY_GROUP_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SNAPSHOT_ALREADY_EXISTS
- RDS:DB_SNAPSHOT_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SUBNET_GROUP_DOES_NOT_COVER_ENOUGH_A_ZS
- RDS:DB_SUBNET_GROUP_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:DB_UPGRADE_DEPENDENCY_FAILURE
- RDS:DOMAIN_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:INCOMPLETE_SIGNATURE
- RDS:INSUFFICIENT_DB_INSTANCE_CAPACITY
- RDS:INSTANCE_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:INTERNAL_FAILURE
- RDS:INVALID_ACTION
- RDS:INVALID_CLIENT_TOKEN_ID
- RDS:INVALID_DB_CLUSTER_STATE_FAULT
- RDS:INVALID_DB_INSTANCE_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_DB_SECURITY_GROUP_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_DB_SNAPSHOT_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_PARAMETER_COMBINATION
- RDS:INVALID_PARAMETER_VALUE
- RDS:INVALID_QUERY_PARAMETER
- RDS:INVALID_RESTORE_FAULT
- RDS:INVALID_SUBNET
- RDS:INVALID_VPC_NETWORK_STATE_FAULT
- RDS:KMS_KEY_NOT_ACCESSIBLE_FAULT
- RDS:MALFORMED_QUERY_STRING
- RDS:MISSING_ACTION
- RDS:MISSING_AUTHENTICATION_TOKEN
- RDS:MISSING_PARAMETER
- RDS:OPT_IN_REQUIRED
- RDS:OPTION_GROUP_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:POINT_IN_TIME_RESTORE_NOT_ENABLED
- RDS:PROVISIONED_IOPS_NOT_AVAILABLE_IN_AZ_FAULT
- RDS:REQUEST_EXPIRED
- RDS:RESERVED_DB_INSTANCE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:RESERVED_DB_INSTANCES_OFFERING_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- RDS:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- RDS:SNAPSHOT_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:STORAGE_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:STORAGE_TYPE_NOT_SUPPORTED
- RDS:THROTTLING_EXCEPTION
- RDS:UNKNOWN
- RDS:VALIDATION_ERROR

## Delete DB Instance

`<rds:delete-db-instance>`

The Delete DB Instance action deletes a previously provisioned DB instance. For more information,
see this operation in the Amazon
[API Reference](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonRDS/latest/APIReference/API_DeleteDBInstance.html).

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>DB Instance Identifier</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The DB instance identifier for the DB instance to be deleted. This parameter isnât case-sensitive.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Final DB Snapshot Identifier</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The DBSnapshotIdentifier of the new DBSnapshot created when SkipFinalSnapshot is set to false.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Skip Final Snapshot</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Determines whether a final DB snapshot is created before the DB instance is deleted.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>false</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#DBInstance">DB Instance</a></p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- RDS:ACCESS_DENIED_EXCEPTION
- RDS:AUTHORIZATION_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:CERTIFICATE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:CONNECTIVITY
- RDS:DB_CLUSTER_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:DB_INSTANCE_ALREADY_EXISTS
- RDS:DB_INSTANCE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_PARAMETER_GROUP_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SECURITY_GROUP_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SNAPSHOT_ALREADY_EXISTS
- RDS:DB_SNAPSHOT_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SUBNET_GROUP_DOES_NOT_COVER_ENOUGH_A_ZS
- RDS:DB_SUBNET_GROUP_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:DB_UPGRADE_DEPENDENCY_FAILURE
- RDS:DOMAIN_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:INCOMPLETE_SIGNATURE
- RDS:INSUFFICIENT_DB_INSTANCE_CAPACITY
- RDS:INSTANCE_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:INTERNAL_FAILURE
- RDS:INVALID_ACTION
- RDS:INVALID_CLIENT_TOKEN_ID
- RDS:INVALID_DB_CLUSTER_STATE_FAULT
- RDS:INVALID_DB_INSTANCE_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_DB_SECURITY_GROUP_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_DB_SNAPSHOT_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_PARAMETER_COMBINATION
- RDS:INVALID_PARAMETER_VALUE
- RDS:INVALID_QUERY_PARAMETER
- RDS:INVALID_RESTORE_FAULT
- RDS:INVALID_SUBNET
- RDS:INVALID_VPC_NETWORK_STATE_FAULT
- RDS:KMS_KEY_NOT_ACCESSIBLE_FAULT
- RDS:MALFORMED_QUERY_STRING
- RDS:MISSING_ACTION
- RDS:MISSING_AUTHENTICATION_TOKEN
- RDS:MISSING_PARAMETER
- RDS:OPT_IN_REQUIRED
- RDS:OPTION_GROUP_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:POINT_IN_TIME_RESTORE_NOT_ENABLED
- RDS:PROVISIONED_IOPS_NOT_AVAILABLE_IN_AZ_FAULT
- RDS:REQUEST_EXPIRED
- RDS:RESERVED_DB_INSTANCE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:RESERVED_DB_INSTANCES_OFFERING_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- RDS:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- RDS:SNAPSHOT_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:STORAGE_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:STORAGE_TYPE_NOT_SUPPORTED
- RDS:THROTTLING_EXCEPTION
- RDS:UNKNOWN
- RDS:VALIDATION_ERROR

## Delete DB Snapshot

`<rds:delete-db-snapshot>`

Deletes a DBSnapshot. If the snapshot is being copied, the copy operation is terminated.

For more information, see this operation in the Amazon
[API Reference](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonRDS/latest/APIReference/API_DeleteDBSnapshot.html).

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>DB Snapshot Identifier</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The DBSnapshot identifier.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#DBSnapshot">DB Snapshot</a></p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- RDS:ACCESS_DENIED_EXCEPTION
- RDS:AUTHORIZATION_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:CERTIFICATE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:CONNECTIVITY
- RDS:DB_CLUSTER_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:DB_INSTANCE_ALREADY_EXISTS
- RDS:DB_INSTANCE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_PARAMETER_GROUP_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SECURITY_GROUP_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SNAPSHOT_ALREADY_EXISTS
- RDS:DB_SNAPSHOT_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SUBNET_GROUP_DOES_NOT_COVER_ENOUGH_A_ZS
- RDS:DB_SUBNET_GROUP_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:DB_UPGRADE_DEPENDENCY_FAILURE
- RDS:DOMAIN_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:INCOMPLETE_SIGNATURE
- RDS:INSUFFICIENT_DB_INSTANCE_CAPACITY
- RDS:INSTANCE_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:INTERNAL_FAILURE
- RDS:INVALID_ACTION
- RDS:INVALID_CLIENT_TOKEN_ID
- RDS:INVALID_DB_CLUSTER_STATE_FAULT
- RDS:INVALID_DB_INSTANCE_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_DB_SECURITY_GROUP_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_DB_SNAPSHOT_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_PARAMETER_COMBINATION
- RDS:INVALID_PARAMETER_VALUE
- RDS:INVALID_QUERY_PARAMETER
- RDS:INVALID_RESTORE_FAULT
- RDS:INVALID_SUBNET
- RDS:INVALID_VPC_NETWORK_STATE_FAULT
- RDS:KMS_KEY_NOT_ACCESSIBLE_FAULT
- RDS:MALFORMED_QUERY_STRING
- RDS:MISSING_ACTION
- RDS:MISSING_AUTHENTICATION_TOKEN
- RDS:MISSING_PARAMETER
- RDS:OPT_IN_REQUIRED
- RDS:OPTION_GROUP_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:POINT_IN_TIME_RESTORE_NOT_ENABLED
- RDS:PROVISIONED_IOPS_NOT_AVAILABLE_IN_AZ_FAULT
- RDS:REQUEST_EXPIRED
- RDS:RESERVED_DB_INSTANCE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:RESERVED_DB_INSTANCES_OFFERING_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- RDS:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- RDS:SNAPSHOT_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:STORAGE_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:STORAGE_TYPE_NOT_SUPPORTED
- RDS:THROTTLING_EXCEPTION
- RDS:UNKNOWN

## Describe DB Instances

`<rds:describe-db-instances>`

Returns information about provisioned RDS instances. This API supports pagination. For more
information, see this operation in the Amazon
[API Reference](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonRDS/latest/APIReference/API_DescribeDBInstances.html).

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>DB Instance Identifier</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The user-supplied instance identifier.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Filters</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#Filter">Filter</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A filter that specifies one or more DB instances to describe.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Streaming Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#repeatable-in-memory-iterable">Repeatable In Memory Iterable</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#repeatable-file-store-iterable">Repeatable File Store Iterable</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-iterable</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behavior.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of a variable on which the operationâs output will be placed.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>An expression that will be evaluated against the operationâs output and the outcome of that expression will be stored in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>#[payload]</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of Message of <a href="#DBInstance">DB Instance</a> payload and <a href="#RequestIDAttribute">Request ID Attribute</a> attributes</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- RDS:ACCESS_DENIED_EXCEPTION
- RDS:AUTHORIZATION_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:CERTIFICATE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:CONNECTIVITY
- RDS:DB_CLUSTER_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:DB_INSTANCE_ALREADY_EXISTS
- RDS:DB_INSTANCE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_PARAMETER_GROUP_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SECURITY_GROUP_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SNAPSHOT_ALREADY_EXISTS
- RDS:DB_SNAPSHOT_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SUBNET_GROUP_DOES_NOT_COVER_ENOUGH_A_ZS
- RDS:DB_SUBNET_GROUP_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:DB_UPGRADE_DEPENDENCY_FAILURE
- RDS:DOMAIN_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:INCOMPLETE_SIGNATURE
- RDS:INSUFFICIENT_DB_INSTANCE_CAPACITY
- RDS:INSTANCE_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:INTERNAL_FAILURE
- RDS:INVALID_ACTION
- RDS:INVALID_CLIENT_TOKEN_ID
- RDS:INVALID_DB_CLUSTER_STATE_FAULT
- RDS:INVALID_DB_INSTANCE_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_DB_SECURITY_GROUP_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_DB_SNAPSHOT_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_PARAMETER_COMBINATION
- RDS:INVALID_PARAMETER_VALUE
- RDS:INVALID_QUERY_PARAMETER
- RDS:INVALID_RESTORE_FAULT
- RDS:INVALID_SUBNET
- RDS:INVALID_VPC_NETWORK_STATE_FAULT
- RDS:KMS_KEY_NOT_ACCESSIBLE_FAULT
- RDS:MALFORMED_QUERY_STRING
- RDS:MISSING_ACTION
- RDS:MISSING_AUTHENTICATION_TOKEN
- RDS:MISSING_PARAMETER
- RDS:OPT_IN_REQUIRED
- RDS:OPTION_GROUP_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:POINT_IN_TIME_RESTORE_NOT_ENABLED
- RDS:PROVISIONED_IOPS_NOT_AVAILABLE_IN_AZ_FAULT
- RDS:REQUEST_EXPIRED
- RDS:RESERVED_DB_INSTANCE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:RESERVED_DB_INSTANCES_OFFERING_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- RDS:SNAPSHOT_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:STORAGE_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:STORAGE_TYPE_NOT_SUPPORTED
- RDS:THROTTLING_EXCEPTION
- RDS:UNKNOWN
- RDS:VALIDATION_ERROR

## Describe DB Snapshots

`<rds:describe-db-snapshots>`

Returns information about DB snapshots. This API action supports pagination. For more information,
see this operation in the Amazon
[API Reference](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonRDS/latest/APIReference/API_DescribeDBSnapshots.html).

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>DB Instance Identifier</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The ID of the DB instance to retrieve the list of DB snapshots for.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>DB Snapshot Identifier</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A specific DB snapshot identifier to describe. This parameter cannot be used in conjunction with DBInstanceIdentifier.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Include Public</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Set this value to true to include manual DB snapshots that are public and can be copied or restored by any AWS account, otherwise set this value to false. The default is false.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>false</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Include Shared</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Set this value to true to include shared manual DB snapshots from other AWS accounts that this AWS account has been given permission to copy or restore, otherwise set this value to false. The default is false.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>false</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Snapshot Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The type of snapshots to be returned.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Max Records</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The maximum number of records to include in the response.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Filters</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#Filter">Filter</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>This parameter is not currently supported.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Streaming Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#repeatable-in-memory-iterable">Repeatable In Memory Iterable</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#repeatable-file-store-iterable">Repeatable File Store Iterable</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-iterable</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Configure to use repeatable streams.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of Message of <a href="#DBSnapshot">DB Snapshot</a> payload and <a href="#RequestIDAttribute">Request ID Attribute</a> attributes</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- RDS:ACCESS_DENIED_EXCEPTION
- RDS:AUTHORIZATION_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:CERTIFICATE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:CONNECTIVITY
- RDS:DB_CLUSTER_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:DB_INSTANCE_ALREADY_EXISTS
- RDS:DB_INSTANCE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_PARAMETER_GROUP_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SECURITY_GROUP_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SNAPSHOT_ALREADY_EXISTS
- RDS:DB_SNAPSHOT_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SUBNET_GROUP_DOES_NOT_COVER_ENOUGH_A_ZS
- RDS:DB_SUBNET_GROUP_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:DB_UPGRADE_DEPENDENCY_FAILURE
- RDS:DOMAIN_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:INCOMPLETE_SIGNATURE
- RDS:INSUFFICIENT_DB_INSTANCE_CAPACITY
- RDS:INSTANCE_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:INTERNAL_FAILURE
- RDS:INVALID_ACTION
- RDS:INVALID_CLIENT_TOKEN_ID
- RDS:INVALID_DB_CLUSTER_STATE_FAULT
- RDS:INVALID_DB_INSTANCE_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_DB_SECURITY_GROUP_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_DB_SNAPSHOT_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_PARAMETER_COMBINATION
- RDS:INVALID_PARAMETER_VALUE
- RDS:INVALID_QUERY_PARAMETER
- RDS:INVALID_RESTORE_FAULT
- RDS:INVALID_SUBNET
- RDS:INVALID_VPC_NETWORK_STATE_FAULT
- RDS:KMS_KEY_NOT_ACCESSIBLE_FAULT
- RDS:MALFORMED_QUERY_STRING
- RDS:MISSING_ACTION
- RDS:MISSING_AUTHENTICATION_TOKEN
- RDS:MISSING_PARAMETER
- RDS:OPT_IN_REQUIRED
- RDS:OPTION_GROUP_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:POINT_IN_TIME_RESTORE_NOT_ENABLED
- RDS:PROVISIONED_IOPS_NOT_AVAILABLE_IN_AZ_FAULT
- RDS:REQUEST_EXPIRED
- RDS:RESERVED_DB_INSTANCE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:RESERVED_DB_INSTANCES_OFFERING_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- RDS:SNAPSHOT_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:STORAGE_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:STORAGE_TYPE_NOT_SUPPORTED
- RDS:THROTTLING_EXCEPTION
- RDS:UNKNOWN
- RDS:VALIDATION_ERROR

## Describe Events

`<rds:describe-events>`

Returns events related to DB instances, DB security groups, DB snapshots, and DB parameter groups
for the past 14 days. Events specific to a particular DB instance, DB security group, database
snapshot, or DB parameter group can be obtained by providing the name as a parameter. By default,
the past hour of events are returned. For more information, see this operation in the Amazon
[API Reference](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonRDS/latest/APIReference/API_DescribeEvents.html).

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Duration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The number of minutes to retrieve events for.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>End Time</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>DateTime</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The end of the time interval for which to retrieve events, specified in ISO 8601 format.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Event Categories</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A list of event categories that trigger notifications for a event notification subscription.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Source Identifier</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The identifier of the event source for which events will be returned. If not specified, then all sources are included in the response.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Source Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The event source to retrieve events for. If no value is specified, all events are returned.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Start Time</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>DateTime</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The beginning of the time interval to retrieve events for, specified in ISO 8601 format.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Streaming Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#repeatable-in-memory-iterable">Repeatable In Memory Iterable</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#repeatable-file-store-iterable">Repeatable File Store Iterable</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-iterable</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Configure to use repeatable streams.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of Message of <a href="#Event">Event</a> payload and <a href="#RequestIDAttribute">Request ID Attribute</a> attributes</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- RDS:ACCESS_DENIED_EXCEPTION
- RDS:AUTHORIZATION_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:CERTIFICATE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:CONNECTIVITY
- RDS:DB_CLUSTER_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:DB_INSTANCE_ALREADY_EXISTS
- RDS:DB_INSTANCE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_PARAMETER_GROUP_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SECURITY_GROUP_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SNAPSHOT_ALREADY_EXISTS
- RDS:DB_SNAPSHOT_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SUBNET_GROUP_DOES_NOT_COVER_ENOUGH_A_ZS
- RDS:DB_SUBNET_GROUP_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:DB_UPGRADE_DEPENDENCY_FAILURE
- RDS:DOMAIN_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:INCOMPLETE_SIGNATURE
- RDS:INSUFFICIENT_DB_INSTANCE_CAPACITY
- RDS:INSTANCE_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:INTERNAL_FAILURE
- RDS:INVALID_ACTION
- RDS:INVALID_CLIENT_TOKEN_ID
- RDS:INVALID_DB_CLUSTER_STATE_FAULT
- RDS:INVALID_DB_INSTANCE_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_DB_SECURITY_GROUP_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_DB_SNAPSHOT_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_PARAMETER_COMBINATION
- RDS:INVALID_PARAMETER_VALUE
- RDS:INVALID_QUERY_PARAMETER
- RDS:INVALID_RESTORE_FAULT
- RDS:INVALID_SUBNET
- RDS:INVALID_VPC_NETWORK_STATE_FAULT
- RDS:KMS_KEY_NOT_ACCESSIBLE_FAULT
- RDS:MALFORMED_QUERY_STRING
- RDS:MISSING_ACTION
- RDS:MISSING_AUTHENTICATION_TOKEN
- RDS:MISSING_PARAMETER
- RDS:OPT_IN_REQUIRED
- RDS:OPTION_GROUP_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:POINT_IN_TIME_RESTORE_NOT_ENABLED
- RDS:PROVISIONED_IOPS_NOT_AVAILABLE_IN_AZ_FAULT
- RDS:REQUEST_EXPIRED
- RDS:RESERVED_DB_INSTANCE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:RESERVED_DB_INSTANCES_OFFERING_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- RDS:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- RDS:SNAPSHOT_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:STORAGE_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:STORAGE_TYPE_NOT_SUPPORTED
- RDS:THROTTLING_EXCEPTION
- RDS:UNKNOWN
- RDS:VALIDATION_ERROR

## Describe Reserved DB Instances

`<rds:describe-reserved-db-instances>`

Returns information about reserved DB instances for this account, or about a specified reserved DB
instance. For more information, see this operation in the Amazon
[API Reference](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonRDS/latest/APIReference/API_DescribeReservedDBInstances.html).

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reserved DB Instance ID</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The reserved DB instance identifier filter value.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reserved DB Instances Offering ID</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The offering identifier filter value. Specify this parameter to show only purchased reservations matching the specified offering identifier.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>DB Instance Class</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The DB instance class filter value. Specify this parameter to show only those reservations matching the specified DB instances class.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Duration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The duration filter value, specified in years or seconds. Specify this parameter to show only reservations for this duration.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Product Description</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The product description filter value. Specify this parameter to show only those reservations matching the specified product description.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Offering Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The offering type filter value. Specify this parameter to show only the available offerings matching the specified offering type.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Multi AZ</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The Multi-AZ filter value. Specify this parameter to show only those reservations matching the specified Multi-AZ parameter.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>false</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Streaming Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#repeatable-in-memory-iterable">Repeatable In Memory Iterable</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#repeatable-file-store-iterable">Repeatable File Store Iterable</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-iterable</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Configure to use repeatable streams.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of Message of [<a href="#ReservedDBInstance">Reserved DB Instance</a>] payload and <a href="#RequestIDAttribute">Request ID Attribute</a> attributes</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- RDS:ACCESS_DENIED_EXCEPTION
- RDS:AUTHORIZATION_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:CERTIFICATE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:CONNECTIVITY
- RDS:DB_CLUSTER_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:DB_INSTANCE_ALREADY_EXISTS
- RDS:DB_INSTANCE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_PARAMETER_GROUP_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SECURITY_GROUP_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SNAPSHOT_ALREADY_EXISTS
- RDS:DB_SNAPSHOT_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SUBNET_GROUP_DOES_NOT_COVER_ENOUGH_A_ZS
- RDS:DB_SUBNET_GROUP_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:DB_UPGRADE_DEPENDENCY_FAILURE
- RDS:DOMAIN_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:INCOMPLETE_SIGNATURE
- RDS:INSUFFICIENT_DB_INSTANCE_CAPACITY
- RDS:INSTANCE_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:INTERNAL_FAILURE
- RDS:INVALID_ACTION
- RDS:INVALID_CLIENT_TOKEN_ID
- RDS:INVALID_DB_CLUSTER_STATE_FAULT
- RDS:INVALID_DB_INSTANCE_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_DB_SECURITY_GROUP_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_DB_SNAPSHOT_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_PARAMETER_COMBINATION
- RDS:INVALID_PARAMETER_VALUE
- RDS:INVALID_QUERY_PARAMETER
- RDS:INVALID_RESTORE_FAULT
- RDS:INVALID_SUBNET
- RDS:INVALID_VPC_NETWORK_STATE_FAULT
- RDS:KMS_KEY_NOT_ACCESSIBLE_FAULT
- RDS:MALFORMED_QUERY_STRING
- RDS:MISSING_ACTION
- RDS:MISSING_AUTHENTICATION_TOKEN
- RDS:MISSING_PARAMETER
- RDS:OPT_IN_REQUIRED
- RDS:OPTION_GROUP_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:POINT_IN_TIME_RESTORE_NOT_ENABLED
- RDS:PROVISIONED_IOPS_NOT_AVAILABLE_IN_AZ_FAULT
- RDS:REQUEST_EXPIRED
- RDS:RESERVED_DB_INSTANCE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:RESERVED_DB_INSTANCES_OFFERING_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- RDS:SNAPSHOT_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:STORAGE_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:STORAGE_TYPE_NOT_SUPPORTED
- RDS:THROTTLING_EXCEPTION
- RDS:UNKNOWN
- RDS:VALIDATION_ERROR

### Describe Reserved DB Instances Offerings

`<rds:describe-reserved-db-instances-offerings>`

Lists available reserved DB instance offerings. For more information, see this operation in the
Amazon
[API Reference](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonRDS/latest/APIReference/API_DescribeReservedDBInstancesOfferings.html).

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>DB Instance Class</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The DB instance class filter value. Specify this parameter to show only the available offerings matching the specified DB instance class.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Duration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Duration filter value, specified in years or seconds. Specify this parameter to show only reservations for this duration.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Multi AZ</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The Multi-AZ filter value. Specify this parameter to show only the available offerings matching the specified Multi-AZ parameter.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>false</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Offering Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The offering type filter value. Specify this parameter to show only the available offerings matching the specified offering type.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Product Description</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Product description filter value. Specify this parameter to show only the available offerings matching the specified product description.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reserved DB Instances Offering ID</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The offering identifier filter value. Specify this parameter to show only the available offering that matches the specified reservation identifier.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Streaming Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#repeatable-in-memory-iterable">Repeatable In Memory Iterable</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#repeatable-file-store-iterable">Repeatable File Store Iterable</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-iterable</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Configure to use repeatable streams.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of Message of [<a href="#ReservedDBInstancesOffering">Reserved DB Instances Offering</a>] payload and <a href="#RequestIDAttribute">Request ID Attribute</a> attributes</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- RDS:ACCESS_DENIED_EXCEPTION
- RDS:AUTHORIZATION_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:CERTIFICATE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:CONNECTIVITY
- RDS:DB_CLUSTER_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:DB_INSTANCE_ALREADY_EXISTS
- RDS:DB_INSTANCE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_PARAMETER_GROUP_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SECURITY_GROUP_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SNAPSHOT_ALREADY_EXISTS
- RDS:DB_SNAPSHOT_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SUBNET_GROUP_DOES_NOT_COVER_ENOUGH_A_ZS
- RDS:DB_SUBNET_GROUP_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:DB_UPGRADE_DEPENDENCY_FAILURE
- RDS:DOMAIN_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:INCOMPLETE_SIGNATURE
- RDS:INSUFFICIENT_DB_INSTANCE_CAPACITY
- RDS:INSTANCE_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:INTERNAL_FAILURE
- RDS:INVALID_ACTION
- RDS:INVALID_CLIENT_TOKEN_ID
- RDS:INVALID_DB_CLUSTER_STATE_FAULT
- RDS:INVALID_DB_INSTANCE_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_DB_SECURITY_GROUP_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_DB_SNAPSHOT_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_PARAMETER_COMBINATION
- RDS:INVALID_PARAMETER_VALUE
- RDS:INVALID_QUERY_PARAMETER
- RDS:INVALID_RESTORE_FAULT
- RDS:INVALID_SUBNET
- RDS:INVALID_VPC_NETWORK_STATE_FAULT
- RDS:KMS_KEY_NOT_ACCESSIBLE_FAULT
- RDS:MALFORMED_QUERY_STRING
- RDS:MISSING_ACTION
- RDS:MISSING_AUTHENTICATION_TOKEN
- RDS:MISSING_PARAMETER
