- RDS:OPTION_GROUP_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:POINT_IN_TIME_RESTORE_NOT_ENABLED
- RDS:PROVISIONED_IOPS_NOT_AVAILABLE_IN_AZ_FAULT
- RDS:REQUEST_EXPIRED
- RDS:RESERVED_DB_INSTANCE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:RESERVED_DB_INSTANCES_OFFERING_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- RDS:SNAPSHOT_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:STORAGE_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:STORAGE_TYPE_NOT_SUPPORTED
- RDS:THROTTLING_EXCEPTION
- RDS:UNKNOWN
- RDS:VALIDATION_ERROR

## Modify DB Instance

`<rds:modify-db-instance>`

Modifies settings for a DB instance. You can change one or more database configuration parameters by
specifying these parameters and the new values in the request. For more information, see this
operation in the Amazon
[API Reference](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonRDS/latest/APIReference/API_ModifyDBInstance.html).

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Auto Minor Version Upgrade</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>false</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Copy Tags to Snapshot</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>false</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Storage Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Allocated Storage</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Backup Retention Period</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Preferred Backup Window</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Preferred Maintenance Window</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Promotion Tier</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Allow Major Version Upgrade</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>false</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Apply Immediately</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>false</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>DB Subnet Group Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Domain IAM Role Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Enable IAM Database Authentication</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>false</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>License Model</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Publicly Accessible</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>false</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>TDE Credential ARN</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>TDE Credential Password</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>DB Security Groups</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Master User Password</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>VPC Security Group IDs</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>CA Certificate Identifier</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Monitoring Interval</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Monitoring Role ARN</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>DB Instance Class</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>DB Instance Identifier</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>DB Parameter Group Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Domain</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Engine Version</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>IOPS</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Multi AZ</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>false</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Option Group Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>DB Port Number</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>New DB Instance Identifier</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#DBInstance">DB Instance</a></p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- RDS:ACCESS_DENIED_EXCEPTION
- RDS:AUTHORIZATION_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:CERTIFICATE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:CONNECTIVITY
- RDS:DB_CLUSTER_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:DB_INSTANCE_ALREADY_EXISTS
- RDS:DB_INSTANCE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_PARAMETER_GROUP_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SECURITY_GROUP_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SNAPSHOT_ALREADY_EXISTS
- RDS:DB_SNAPSHOT_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SUBNET_GROUP_DOES_NOT_COVER_ENOUGH_A_ZS
- RDS:DB_SUBNET_GROUP_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:DB_UPGRADE_DEPENDENCY_FAILURE
- RDS:DOMAIN_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:INCOMPLETE_SIGNATURE
- RDS:INSUFFICIENT_DB_INSTANCE_CAPACITY
- RDS:INSTANCE_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:INTERNAL_FAILURE
- RDS:INVALID_ACTION
- RDS:INVALID_CLIENT_TOKEN_ID
- RDS:INVALID_DB_CLUSTER_STATE_FAULT
- RDS:INVALID_DB_INSTANCE_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_DB_SECURITY_GROUP_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_DB_SNAPSHOT_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_PARAMETER_COMBINATION
- RDS:INVALID_PARAMETER_VALUE
- RDS:INVALID_QUERY_PARAMETER
- RDS:INVALID_RESTORE_FAULT
- RDS:INVALID_SUBNET
- RDS:INVALID_VPC_NETWORK_STATE_FAULT
- RDS:KMS_KEY_NOT_ACCESSIBLE_FAULT
- RDS:MALFORMED_QUERY_STRING
- RDS:MISSING_ACTION
- RDS:MISSING_AUTHENTICATION_TOKEN
- RDS:MISSING_PARAMETER
- RDS:OPT_IN_REQUIRED
- RDS:OPTION_GROUP_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:POINT_IN_TIME_RESTORE_NOT_ENABLED
- RDS:PROVISIONED_IOPS_NOT_AVAILABLE_IN_AZ_FAULT
- RDS:REQUEST_EXPIRED
- RDS:RESERVED_DB_INSTANCE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:RESERVED_DB_INSTANCES_OFFERING_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- RDS:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- RDS:SNAPSHOT_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:STORAGE_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:STORAGE_TYPE_NOT_SUPPORTED
- RDS:THROTTLING_EXCEPTION
- RDS:UNKNOWN
- RDS:VALIDATION_ERROR

## Modify DB Snapshot

`<rds:modify-db-snapshot>`

Updates a manual DB snapshot, which can be encrypted or not encrypted, with a new engine version.
You can update the engine version to either a new major or minor engine version.

For more information, see this operation in the Amazon
[API Reference](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonRDS/latest/APIReference/API_ModifyDBSnapshot.html).

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>DB Snapshot Identifier</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The identifier of the DB snapshot to modify.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Engine Version</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The engine version to update the DB snapshot to.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#DBSnapshot">DB Snapshot</a></p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- RDS:ACCESS_DENIED_EXCEPTION
- RDS:AUTHORIZATION_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:CERTIFICATE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:CONNECTIVITY
- RDS:DB_CLUSTER_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:DB_INSTANCE_ALREADY_EXISTS
- RDS:DB_INSTANCE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_PARAMETER_GROUP_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SECURITY_GROUP_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SNAPSHOT_ALREADY_EXISTS
- RDS:DB_SNAPSHOT_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SUBNET_GROUP_DOES_NOT_COVER_ENOUGH_A_ZS
- RDS:DB_SUBNET_GROUP_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:DB_UPGRADE_DEPENDENCY_FAILURE
- RDS:DOMAIN_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:INCOMPLETE_SIGNATURE
- RDS:INSUFFICIENT_DB_INSTANCE_CAPACITY
- RDS:INSTANCE_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:INTERNAL_FAILURE
- RDS:INVALID_ACTION
- RDS:INVALID_CLIENT_TOKEN_ID
- RDS:INVALID_DB_CLUSTER_STATE_FAULT
- RDS:INVALID_DB_INSTANCE_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_DB_SECURITY_GROUP_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_DB_SNAPSHOT_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_PARAMETER_COMBINATION
- RDS:INVALID_PARAMETER_VALUE
- RDS:INVALID_QUERY_PARAMETER
- RDS:INVALID_RESTORE_FAULT
- RDS:INVALID_SUBNET
- RDS:INVALID_VPC_NETWORK_STATE_FAULT
- RDS:KMS_KEY_NOT_ACCESSIBLE_FAULT
- RDS:MALFORMED_QUERY_STRING
- RDS:MISSING_ACTION
- RDS:MISSING_AUTHENTICATION_TOKEN
- RDS:MISSING_PARAMETER
- RDS:OPT_IN_REQUIRED
- RDS:OPTION_GROUP_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:POINT_IN_TIME_RESTORE_NOT_ENABLED
- RDS:PROVISIONED_IOPS_NOT_AVAILABLE_IN_AZ_FAULT
- RDS:REQUEST_EXPIRED
- RDS:RESERVED_DB_INSTANCE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:RESERVED_DB_INSTANCES_OFFERING_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- RDS:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- RDS:SNAPSHOT_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:STORAGE_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:STORAGE_TYPE_NOT_SUPPORTED
- RDS:THROTTLING_EXCEPTION
- RDS:UNKNOWN
- RDS:VALIDATION_ERROR

## Purchase Reserved DB Instances Offering

`<rds:purchase-reserved-db-instances-offering>`

Purchases a reserved DB instance offering. For more information, see this operation in the Amazon
[API Reference](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonRDS/latest/APIReference/API_PurchaseReservedDBInstancesOffering.html).

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reserved DB Instances Offering ID</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The ID of the Reserved DB instance offering to purchase.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>DB Instance Count</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The number of instances to reserve.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reserved DB Instance ID</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Customer-specified identifier to track this reservation.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Tags</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#Tag">Tag</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A list of tags.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#ReservedDBInstance">Reserved DB Instance</a></p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- RDS:ACCESS_DENIED_EXCEPTION
- RDS:AUTHORIZATION_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:CERTIFICATE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:CONNECTIVITY
- RDS:DB_CLUSTER_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:DB_INSTANCE_ALREADY_EXISTS
- RDS:DB_INSTANCE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_PARAMETER_GROUP_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SECURITY_GROUP_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SNAPSHOT_ALREADY_EXISTS
- RDS:DB_SNAPSHOT_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SUBNET_GROUP_DOES_NOT_COVER_ENOUGH_A_ZS
- RDS:DB_SUBNET_GROUP_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:DB_UPGRADE_DEPENDENCY_FAILURE
- RDS:DOMAIN_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:INCOMPLETE_SIGNATURE
- RDS:INSUFFICIENT_DB_INSTANCE_CAPACITY
- RDS:INSTANCE_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:INTERNAL_FAILURE
- RDS:INVALID_ACTION
- RDS:INVALID_CLIENT_TOKEN_ID
- RDS:INVALID_DB_CLUSTER_STATE_FAULT
- RDS:INVALID_DB_INSTANCE_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_DB_SECURITY_GROUP_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_DB_SNAPSHOT_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_PARAMETER_COMBINATION
- RDS:INVALID_PARAMETER_VALUE
- RDS:INVALID_QUERY_PARAMETER
- RDS:INVALID_RESTORE_FAULT
- RDS:INVALID_SUBNET
- RDS:INVALID_VPC_NETWORK_STATE_FAULT
- RDS:KMS_KEY_NOT_ACCESSIBLE_FAULT
- RDS:MALFORMED_QUERY_STRING
- RDS:MISSING_ACTION
- RDS:MISSING_AUTHENTICATION_TOKEN

- RDS:OPTION_GROUP_NOT_FOUND_FAULT

- RDS:RESERVED_DB_INSTANCES_OFFERING_NOT_FOUND

- RDS:THROTTLING_EXCEPTION
- RDS:UNKNOWN
- RDS:VALIDATION_ERROR

## Reboot DB Instance

`<rds:reboot-db-instance>`

This operation reboots a DB instance restarts the database engine service.

For more information, see this operation in the Amazon
[API Reference](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonRDS/latest/APIReference/API_RebootDBInstance.html).

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>DB Instance Identifier</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The DB instance identifier.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Force Failover</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>When true, the reboot will be conducted through a MultiAZ failover.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>false</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#DBInstance">DB Instance</a></p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- RDS:ACCESS_DENIED_EXCEPTION
- RDS:AUTHORIZATION_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:CERTIFICATE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:CONNECTIVITY
- RDS:DB_CLUSTER_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:DB_INSTANCE_ALREADY_EXISTS
- RDS:DB_INSTANCE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_PARAMETER_GROUP_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SECURITY_GROUP_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SNAPSHOT_ALREADY_EXISTS
- RDS:DB_SNAPSHOT_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SUBNET_GROUP_DOES_NOT_COVER_ENOUGH_A_ZS
- RDS:DB_SUBNET_GROUP_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:DB_UPGRADE_DEPENDENCY_FAILURE
- RDS:DOMAIN_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:INCOMPLETE_SIGNATURE
- RDS:INSUFFICIENT_DB_INSTANCE_CAPACITY
- RDS:INSTANCE_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:INTERNAL_FAILURE
- RDS:INVALID_ACTION
- RDS:INVALID_CLIENT_TOKEN_ID
- RDS:INVALID_DB_CLUSTER_STATE_FAULT
- RDS:INVALID_DB_INSTANCE_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_DB_SECURITY_GROUP_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_DB_SNAPSHOT_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_PARAMETER_COMBINATION
- RDS:INVALID_PARAMETER_VALUE
- RDS:INVALID_QUERY_PARAMETER
- RDS:INVALID_RESTORE_FAULT
- RDS:INVALID_SUBNET
- RDS:INVALID_VPC_NETWORK_STATE_FAULT
- RDS:KMS_KEY_NOT_ACCESSIBLE_FAULT
- RDS:MALFORMED_QUERY_STRING
- RDS:MISSING_ACTION
- RDS:MISSING_AUTHENTICATION_TOKEN
- RDS:MISSING_PARAMETER
- RDS:OPT_IN_REQUIRED
- RDS:OPTION_GROUP_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:POINT_IN_TIME_RESTORE_NOT_ENABLED
- RDS:PROVISIONED_IOPS_NOT_AVAILABLE_IN_AZ_FAULT
- RDS:REQUEST_EXPIRED
- RDS:RESERVED_DB_INSTANCE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:RESERVED_DB_INSTANCES_OFFERING_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- RDS:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- RDS:SNAPSHOT_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:STORAGE_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:STORAGE_TYPE_NOT_SUPPORTED
- RDS:THROTTLING_EXCEPTION
- RDS:UNKNOWN
- RDS:VALIDATION_ERROR

## Restore DB Instance From DB Snapshot

`<rds:restore-db-instance-from-db-snapshot>`

Creates a new DB instance from a DB snapshot. For more information, see this operation in the Amazon
[API Reference](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonRDS/latest/APIReference/API_RestoreDBInstanceFromDBSnapshot.html).

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Availability Zone</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The EC2 Availability Zone that the database instance will be created in.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>DB Instance Class</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The compute and memory capacity of the Amazon RDS DB instance.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>DB Instance Identifier</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the DB instance to create from the DB snapshot. This parameter isnât case-sensitive.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>DB Snapshot Identifier</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The identifier for the DB snapshot to restore from.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>DB Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The database name for the restored DB instance.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Domain</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Specify the Active Directory Domain to restore the instance in.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Engine</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The database engine to use for the new instance.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>IOPS</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Specifies the amount of provisioned IOPS for the DB instance, expressed in I/O operations per second.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Multi AZ</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Specifies if the DB instance is a Multi-AZ deployment.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>false</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Option Group Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of the option group to use for the restored DB instance.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Port</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The port number on which the database accepts connections.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Tags</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#Tag">Tag</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A list of tags.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Auto Minor Version Upgrade</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>false</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Copy Tags to Snapshot</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>false</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Storage Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>DB Subnet Group Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Domain IAM Role Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Enable IAM Database Authentication</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>false</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>License Model</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Publicly Accessible</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>false</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>TDE Credential ARN</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>TDE Credential Password</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#DBInstance">DB Instance</a></p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- RDS:ACCESS_DENIED_EXCEPTION
- RDS:AUTHORIZATION_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:CERTIFICATE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:CONNECTIVITY
- RDS:DB_CLUSTER_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:DB_INSTANCE_ALREADY_EXISTS
- RDS:DB_INSTANCE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_PARAMETER_GROUP_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SECURITY_GROUP_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SNAPSHOT_ALREADY_EXISTS
- RDS:DB_SNAPSHOT_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SUBNET_GROUP_DOES_NOT_COVER_ENOUGH_A_ZS
- RDS:DB_SUBNET_GROUP_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:DB_UPGRADE_DEPENDENCY_FAILURE
- RDS:DOMAIN_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:INCOMPLETE_SIGNATURE
- RDS:INSUFFICIENT_DB_INSTANCE_CAPACITY
- RDS:INSTANCE_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:INTERNAL_FAILURE
- RDS:INVALID_ACTION
- RDS:INVALID_CLIENT_TOKEN_ID
- RDS:INVALID_DB_CLUSTER_STATE_FAULT
- RDS:INVALID_DB_INSTANCE_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_DB_SECURITY_GROUP_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_DB_SNAPSHOT_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_PARAMETER_COMBINATION
- RDS:INVALID_PARAMETER_VALUE
- RDS:INVALID_QUERY_PARAMETER
- RDS:INVALID_RESTORE_FAULT
- RDS:INVALID_SUBNET
- RDS:INVALID_VPC_NETWORK_STATE_FAULT
- RDS:KMS_KEY_NOT_ACCESSIBLE_FAULT
- RDS:MALFORMED_QUERY_STRING
- RDS:MISSING_ACTION
- RDS:MISSING_AUTHENTICATION_TOKEN
- RDS:MISSING_PARAMETER
- RDS:OPT_IN_REQUIRED
- RDS:OPTION_GROUP_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:POINT_IN_TIME_RESTORE_NOT_ENABLED
- RDS:PROVISIONED_IOPS_NOT_AVAILABLE_IN_AZ_FAULT
- RDS:REQUEST_EXPIRED
- RDS:RESERVED_DB_INSTANCE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:RESERVED_DB_INSTANCES_OFFERING_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- RDS:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- RDS:SNAPSHOT_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:STORAGE_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:STORAGE_TYPE_NOT_SUPPORTED
- RDS:THROTTLING_EXCEPTION
- RDS:UNKNOWN
- RDS:VALIDATION_ERROR

## Restore DB Instance To Point In Time

`<rds:restore-db-instance-to-point-in-time>`

Restores a DB instance to an arbitrary point in time. You can restore to any point in time before
the time identified by the LatestRestorableTime property. You can restore to a point up to the
number of days specified by the BackupRetentionPeriod property.

For more information, see this operation in the Amazon
[API Reference](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonRDS/latest/APIReference/API_RestoreDBInstanceToPointInTime.html).

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Availability Zone</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The EC2 Availability Zone that the database instance will be created in.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>DB Instance Class</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The compute and memory capacity of the Amazon RDS DB instance.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>DB Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The database name for the restored DB instance.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Domain</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Specify the Active Directory Domain to restore the instance in.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Engine</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The database engine to use for the new instance.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>IOPS</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The amount of Provisioned IOPS (input/output operations per second) to be initially allocated for the DB instance.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Multi AZ</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Specifies if the DB instance is a Multi-AZ deployment.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>false</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Option Group Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of the option group to use for the restored DB instance.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Port</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The port number on which the database accepts connections.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Restore Time</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>DateTime</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The date and time to restore from.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Source DB Instance Identifier</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The identifier of the source DB instance from which to restore.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Tags</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#Tag">Tag</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A list of tags.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target DB Instance Identifier</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of the new database instance to be created.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Use Latest Restorable Time</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Specifies whether (true) or not (false) the DB instance is restored from the latest backup time.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>false</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Auto Minor Version Upgrade</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>false</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Copy Tags to Snapshot</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>false</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Storage Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>DB Subnet Group Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Domain IAM Role Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Enable IAM Database Authentication</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>false</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>License Model</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Publicly Accessible</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>false</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>TDE Credential ARN</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>TDE Credential Password</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#DBInstance">DB Instance</a></p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- RDS:ACCESS_DENIED_EXCEPTION
- RDS:AUTHORIZATION_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:CERTIFICATE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:CONNECTIVITY
- RDS:DB_CLUSTER_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:DB_INSTANCE_ALREADY_EXISTS
- RDS:DB_INSTANCE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_PARAMETER_GROUP_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SECURITY_GROUP_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SNAPSHOT_ALREADY_EXISTS
- RDS:DB_SNAPSHOT_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SUBNET_GROUP_DOES_NOT_COVER_ENOUGH_A_ZS
- RDS:DB_SUBNET_GROUP_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:DB_UPGRADE_DEPENDENCY_FAILURE
- RDS:DOMAIN_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:INCOMPLETE_SIGNATURE
- RDS:INSUFFICIENT_DB_INSTANCE_CAPACITY
- RDS:INSTANCE_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:INTERNAL_FAILURE
- RDS:INVALID_ACTION
- RDS:INVALID_CLIENT_TOKEN_ID
- RDS:INVALID_DB_CLUSTER_STATE_FAULT
- RDS:INVALID_DB_INSTANCE_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_DB_SECURITY_GROUP_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_DB_SNAPSHOT_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_PARAMETER_COMBINATION
- RDS:INVALID_PARAMETER_VALUE
- RDS:INVALID_QUERY_PARAMETER
- RDS:INVALID_RESTORE_FAULT
- RDS:INVALID_SUBNET
- RDS:INVALID_VPC_NETWORK_STATE_FAULT
- RDS:KMS_KEY_NOT_ACCESSIBLE_FAULT
- RDS:MALFORMED_QUERY_STRING
- RDS:MISSING_ACTION
- RDS:MISSING_AUTHENTICATION_TOKEN
- RDS:MISSING_PARAMETER
- RDS:OPT_IN_REQUIRED
- RDS:OPTION_GROUP_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:POINT_IN_TIME_RESTORE_NOT_ENABLED
- RDS:PROVISIONED_IOPS_NOT_AVAILABLE_IN_AZ_FAULT
- RDS:REQUEST_EXPIRED
- RDS:RESERVED_DB_INSTANCE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:RESERVED_DB_INSTANCES_OFFERING_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- RDS:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- RDS:SNAPSHOT_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:STORAGE_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:STORAGE_TYPE_NOT_SUPPORTED
- RDS:THROTTLING_EXCEPTION
- RDS:UNKNOWN
- RDS:VALIDATION_ERROR

## Start DB Instance

`<rds:start-db-instance>`

Starts a DB instance that was stopped using the AWS console, the `stop-db-instance` AWS CLI command,
or the Stop DB Instance action.

For more information, see this operation in the Amazon
[API Reference](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonRDS/latest/APIReference/API_StartDBInstance.html).

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>DB Instance Identifier</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The user-supplied instance identifier.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#DBInstance">DB Instance</a></p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- RDS:ACCESS_DENIED_EXCEPTION
- RDS:AUTHORIZATION_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:CERTIFICATE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:CONNECTIVITY
- RDS:DB_CLUSTER_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:DB_INSTANCE_ALREADY_EXISTS
- RDS:DB_INSTANCE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_PARAMETER_GROUP_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SECURITY_GROUP_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SNAPSHOT_ALREADY_EXISTS
- RDS:DB_SNAPSHOT_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SUBNET_GROUP_DOES_NOT_COVER_ENOUGH_A_ZS
- RDS:DB_SUBNET_GROUP_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:DB_UPGRADE_DEPENDENCY_FAILURE
- RDS:DOMAIN_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:INCOMPLETE_SIGNATURE
- RDS:INSUFFICIENT_DB_INSTANCE_CAPACITY
- RDS:INSTANCE_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:INTERNAL_FAILURE
- RDS:INVALID_ACTION
- RDS:INVALID_CLIENT_TOKEN_ID
- RDS:INVALID_DB_CLUSTER_STATE_FAULT
- RDS:INVALID_DB_INSTANCE_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_DB_SECURITY_GROUP_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_DB_SNAPSHOT_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_PARAMETER_COMBINATION
- RDS:INVALID_PARAMETER_VALUE
- RDS:INVALID_QUERY_PARAMETER
- RDS:INVALID_RESTORE_FAULT
- RDS:INVALID_SUBNET
- RDS:INVALID_VPC_NETWORK_STATE_FAULT
- RDS:KMS_KEY_NOT_ACCESSIBLE_FAULT
- RDS:MALFORMED_QUERY_STRING
- RDS:MISSING_ACTION
- RDS:MISSING_AUTHENTICATION_TOKEN
- RDS:MISSING_PARAMETER
- RDS:OPT_IN_REQUIRED
- RDS:OPTION_GROUP_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:POINT_IN_TIME_RESTORE_NOT_ENABLED
- RDS:PROVISIONED_IOPS_NOT_AVAILABLE_IN_AZ_FAULT
- RDS:REQUEST_EXPIRED
- RDS:RESERVED_DB_INSTANCE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:RESERVED_DB_INSTANCES_OFFERING_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- RDS:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- RDS:SNAPSHOT_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:STORAGE_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:STORAGE_TYPE_NOT_SUPPORTED
- RDS:THROTTLING_EXCEPTION
- RDS:UNKNOWN
- RDS:VALIDATION_ERROR

## Stop DB Instance

`<rds:stop-db-instance>`

This operation stops a DB instance.

For more information, see this operation in the Amazon
[API Reference](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonRDS/latest/APIReference/API_StopDBInstance.html).

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>DB Instance Identifier</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The user-supplied instance identifier.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>DB Snapshot Identifier</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The user-supplied instance identifier of the DB Snapshot created immediately before the DB instance is stopped.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#DBInstance">DB Instance</a></p></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- RDS:ACCESS_DENIED_EXCEPTION
- RDS:AUTHORIZATION_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:CERTIFICATE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:CONNECTIVITY
- RDS:DB_CLUSTER_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:DB_INSTANCE_ALREADY_EXISTS
- RDS:DB_INSTANCE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_PARAMETER_GROUP_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SECURITY_GROUP_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SNAPSHOT_ALREADY_EXISTS
- RDS:DB_SNAPSHOT_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:DB_SUBNET_GROUP_DOES_NOT_COVER_ENOUGH_A_ZS
- RDS:DB_SUBNET_GROUP_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:DB_UPGRADE_DEPENDENCY_FAILURE
- RDS:DOMAIN_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:INCOMPLETE_SIGNATURE
- RDS:INSUFFICIENT_DB_INSTANCE_CAPACITY
- RDS:INSTANCE_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:INTERNAL_FAILURE
- RDS:INVALID_ACTION
- RDS:INVALID_CLIENT_TOKEN_ID
- RDS:INVALID_DB_CLUSTER_STATE_FAULT
- RDS:INVALID_DB_INSTANCE_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_DB_SECURITY_GROUP_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_DB_SNAPSHOT_STATE
- RDS:INVALID_PARAMETER_COMBINATION
- RDS:INVALID_PARAMETER_VALUE
- RDS:INVALID_QUERY_PARAMETER
- RDS:INVALID_RESTORE_FAULT
- RDS:INVALID_SUBNET
- RDS:INVALID_VPC_NETWORK_STATE_FAULT
- RDS:KMS_KEY_NOT_ACCESSIBLE_FAULT
- RDS:MALFORMED_QUERY_STRING
- RDS:MISSING_ACTION
- RDS:MISSING_AUTHENTICATION_TOKEN
- RDS:MISSING_PARAMETER
- RDS:OPT_IN_REQUIRED
- RDS:OPTION_GROUP_NOT_FOUND_FAULT
- RDS:POINT_IN_TIME_RESTORE_NOT_ENABLED
- RDS:PROVISIONED_IOPS_NOT_AVAILABLE_IN_AZ_FAULT
- RDS:REQUEST_EXPIRED
- RDS:RESERVED_DB_INSTANCE_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:RESERVED_DB_INSTANCES_OFFERING_NOT_FOUND
- RDS:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- RDS:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- RDS:SNAPSHOT_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:STORAGE_QUOTA_EXCEEDED
- RDS:STORAGE_TYPE_NOT_SUPPORTED
- RDS:THROTTLING_EXCEPTION
- RDS:UNKNOWN
- RDS:VALIDATION_ERROR

## Authentication Types

### TLS

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Enabled Protocols</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A comma-separated list of protocols enabled for this context.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Enabled Cipher Suites</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A comma-separated list of cipher suites enabled for this context.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Trust Store</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#TrustStore">Trust Store</a></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Key Store</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#KeyStore">Key Store</a></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Revocation Check</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#standard-revocation-check">Standard Revocation Check</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#custom-ocsp-responder">Custom OCSP Responder</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#crl-file">CRL File</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Trust Store

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Path</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The location (which will be resolved relative to the current classpath and file system, if possible) of the trust store.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Password</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The password used to protect the trust store.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The type of store used.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Algorithm</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The algorithm used by the trust store.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Insecure</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>If true, no certificate validations will be performed, rendering connections vulnerable to attacks. Use at your own risk.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Key Store

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Path</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The location (which will be resolved relative to the current classpath and file system, if possible) of the key store.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The type of store used.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Alias</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>When the key store contains many private keys, this attribute indicates the alias of the key that should be used. If not defined, the first key in the file will be used by default.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Key Password</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The password used to protect the private key.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Password</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The password used to protect the key store.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Algorithm</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The algorithm used by the key store.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Standard Revocation Check

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Only End Entities</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Only verify the last element of the certificate chain.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Prefer Crls</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Try CRL instead of OCSP first.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>No Fallback</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Do not use the secondary checking method (the one not selected before).</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Soft Fail</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Avoid verification failure when the revocation server can not be reached or is busy.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Custom OCSP Responder

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Url</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The URL of the OCSP responder.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Cert Alias</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Alias of the signing certificate for the OCSP response (must be in the trust store), if present.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### CRL File

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Path</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The path to the CRL file.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- RDS:AccessDeniedException
- RDS:AuthorizationNotFound
- RDS:CertificateNotFound
- RDS:CONNECTIVITY
- RDS:DBClusterNotFoundFault
- RDS:DBInstanceAlreadyExists
- RDS:DBInstanceNotFound
- RDS:DBParameterGroupNotFound
- RDS:DBSecurityGroupNotFound
- RDS:DBSnapshotAlreadyExists
- RDS:DBSnapshotNotFound
- RDS:DBSubnetGroupDoesNotCoverEnoughAZs
- RDS:DBSubnetGroupNotFoundFault
- RDS:DBUpgradeDependencyFailure
- RDS:DomainNotFoundFault
- RDS:IncompleteSignature
- RDS:InstanceQuotaExceeded
- RDS:InsufficientDBInstanceCapacity
- RDS:InternalFailure
- RDS:InvalidAction
- RDS:InvalidClientTokenId
- RDS:InvalidDBClusterStateFault
- RDS:InvalidDBInstanceState
- RDS:InvalidDBSecurityGroupState
- RDS:InvalidDBSnapshotState
- RDS:InvalidParameterCombination
- RDS:InvalidParameterValue
- RDS:InvalidQueryParameter
- RDS:InvalidRestoreFault
- RDS:InvalidSubnet
- RDS:InvalidVPCNetworkStateFault
- RDS:KMSKeyNotAccessibleFault
- RDS:MalformedQueryString
- RDS:MissingAction
- RDS:MissingAuthenticationToken
- RDS:MissingParameter
- RDS:OptInRequired
- RDS:OptionGroupNotFoundFault
- RDS:PointInTimeRestoreNotEnabled
- RDS:ProvisionedIopsNotAvailableInAZFault
- RDS:RequestExpired
- RDS:ReservedDBInstanceNotFound
- RDS:ReservedDBInstancesOfferingNotFound
- RDS:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- RDS:ServiceUnavailable
- RDS:SnapshotQuotaExceeded
- RDS:StorageQuotaExceeded
- RDS:StorageTypeNotSupported
- RDS:ThrottlingException
- RDS:Unknown
- RDS:ValidationError

## Types

## Reconnection

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Fails Deployment</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>When the application is deployed, a connectivity test is performed on all connectors. If set to true, deployment fails if the test doesnât pass after exhausting the associated reconnection strategy.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The reconnection strategy to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Reconnect

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Frequency</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How often to reconnect (in milliseconds).</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Count</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The number of reconnection attempts to make.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>blocking</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>If false, the reconnection strategy runs in a separate, non-blocking thread.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>true</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Reconnect Forever

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Frequency</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How often in milliseconds to reconnect.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>blocking</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>If false, the reconnection strategy runs in a separate, non-blocking thread.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>true</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Expiration Policy

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Max Idle Time</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A scalar time value for the maximum amount of time a dynamic configuration instance should be allowed to be idle before itâs considered eligible for expiration.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Time Unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A time unit that qualifies the maxIdleTime attribute</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

## DB Instance

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Allocated Storage</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Auto Minor Version Upgrade</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Availability Zone</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Backup Retention Period</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Ca Certificate Identifier</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Character Set Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Copy Tags To Snapshot</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Db Cluster Identifier</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Db Instance Arn</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Db Instance Class</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Db Instance Identifier</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Db Instance Port</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Db Instance Status</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Db Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Db Parameter Groups</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#DBParameterGroupStatus">DB Parameter Group Status</a></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Db Security Groups</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#DBSecurityGroupMembership">DB Security Group Membership</a></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Db Subnet Group</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#DBSubnetGroup">DB Subnet Group</a></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Dbi Resource Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Domain Memberships</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#DomainMembership">Domain Membership</a></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Endpoint</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#Endpoint">Endpoint</a></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Engine</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Engine Version</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Enhanced Monitoring Resource Arn</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Iam Database Authentication Enabled</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Instance Create Time</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>DateTime</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Iops</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Kms Key Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Latest Restorable Time</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>DateTime</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>License Model</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Master Username</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Monitoring Interval</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Monitoring Role Arn</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Multi AZ</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Option Group Memberships</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#OptionGroupMembership">Option Group Membership</a></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Pending Modified Values</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#PendingModifiedValues">Pending Modified Values</a></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Preferred Backup Window</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Preferred Maintenance Window</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Promotion Tier</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Publicly Accessible</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Read Replica DB Cluster Identifiers</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Read Replica DB Instance Identifiers</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Read Replica Source DB Instance Identifier</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Secondary Availability Zone</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Status Infos</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#DBInstanceStatusInfo">DB Instance Status Info</a></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Storage Encrypted</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Storage Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Tde Credential Arn</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Timezone</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Vpc Security Groups</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#VpcSecurityGroupMembership">VPC Security Group Membership</a></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

Progress</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Port</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Snapshot
